ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who created the resource */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the resource */,
  "sort_by" INTEGER /* Sorting order of the resource */,
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of resource */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was created */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was last updated */,
  "resource_status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., active, deprecated, draft) */,
  "last_accessed_date" TEXT /* Last date the resource was accessed */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the resource has been used */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resource is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_resource_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_type_id") REFERENCES resource_types ("resource_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "resource_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "resource_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resource type is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, technical writer, QA engineer) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the resource was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes for the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  "approved_by" TEXT /* Username of the user who approved the version */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date the version was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the reference belongs to */,
  "reference_url" TEXT /* URL of the external reference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the reference */,
  "reference_type" TEXT /* Type of reference (e.g., documentation, standard, article) */,
  "last_verified_date" TEXT /* Last date the reference was verified for accuracy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_references_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being used */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project or context where the resource is used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was used */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context or project where the resource was used */,
  "usage_context" TEXT /* Detailed context of where the resource was used */,
  "usage_status" TEXT /* Status of the usage (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
